[et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” custom_padding=”25px||60px||false|false” border_width_top=”1px” border_color_top=”#2B59C0″ border_color_bottom=”#2b59c0″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ use_custom_gutter=”on” make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” max_width=”1110px” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_gallery gallery_ids=”3881,3880″ fullwidth=”on” _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” auto=”on” auto_speed=”3000″ locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_gallery][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” custom_padding=”81px||||false|false” custom_padding_tablet=”0px||||false|false” custom_padding_phone=”0px||||false|false” custom_padding_last_edited=”on|tablet” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” text_font=”Gruppo|700|||||||” text_font_size=”21px” header_font=”Gruppo|600||on|||||” header_text_align=”left” header_text_color=”#232323″ header_font_size=”25px” header_line_height=”1.3em” header_2_font=”Gruppo|700|||||||” header_2_font_size=”35px” header_4_font=”Oswald|700||on|||||” header_4_text_align=”center” header_4_text_color=”#171a25″ header_4_font_size=”40px” header_4_letter_spacing=”-0.2px” custom_margin=”||19px|||” header_2_font_size_tablet=”35px” header_2_font_size_phone=”25px” header_2_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” header_4_font_size_tablet=”” header_4_font_size_phone=”30px” header_4_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

CONCERTINA BAG

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”||14px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”]

The Flow concertina bag will help to fold and store your glider in the best possible way to maintain the performance and the inflation characteristics of your glider by protecting the internal rods maintaining the shape of the leading edge.

Keeping your glider in the Flow concertina bag will also minimize panel stretching and fabric abrasion. Easy to use minimalist design to facilitate storage process and transport with 4 compression clips and riser pocket.

 

  • Weight:  290g
  • Length:  255cm

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
